std-agent-rag.description: agent molecule — std-agent-rag (states: completed, generating, idle, retrieving)

std-agent-tool-loop.statePattern: checking, completed, executing, failed, idle, planning

std-agent-assistant.name: std-agent-assistant
std-agent-assistant.description: Agent chat assistant: conversation, persistent memory, provider config (ChatGPT-style).

std-agent-builder.name: std-agent-builder
std-agent-builder.description: Agent app builder: prompt-driven plan/build/fix loop. Pick for NL app generators.

std-agent-pipeline.name: std-agent-pipeline
std-agent-pipeline.description: Agent pipeline: multi-step planned execution with session tree and progress logs.

std-agent-reviewer.name: std-agent-reviewer
std-agent-reviewer.description: Agent reviewer: code/doc review with RAG analysis and issue tracking.

std-agent-tutor.name: std-agent-tutor
std-agent-tutor.description: Agent tutor: personalized tutoring with quizzes, concepts, and student assessments.

std-ap-bill.name: std-ap-bill
std-ap-bill.description: std-ap-bill — accounts-payable bill atom. Owns an ApBill entity (vendor bills we owe) and a single trait that loads bills into a data-grid with Pay and Void row actions. Counterpart to std-invoice on the payables side.

std-applicant.name: std-applicant
std-applicant.description: std-applicant — job applicant primitive tracking a person who applied to a job, their pipeline stage, and basic info. Lists applicants in `browsing`; opens applicant detail in `viewing_single` with Advance / Reject actions.

std-application.name: std-application
std-application.description: std-application — job-style application bundle: form + attachments + status flow (draft/submitted/under-review/accepted/rejected).

std-approval-request.name: std-approval-request
std-approval-request.description: std-approval-request — generic approval step for routing a target (timesheet, expense, PTO, etc.) through requestor + approver decisions. Lists requests in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Approve / Reject / Request Info / Withdraw actions.

std-campaign-goal.name: std-campaign-goal
std-campaign-goal.description: std-campaign-goal — nonprofit fundraising campaign with target / raised / donor count / deadline / status. Lists campaigns in `browsing`; opens campaign detail in `viewing_single` with Launch / End actions.

std-change-order.name: std-change-order
std-change-order.description: std-change-order — construction change-order primitive tracking contract scope/cost/schedule modifications with owner approval. Lists orders in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Approve / Reject / Execute / Delete actions.

std-chart-of-accounts.name: std-chart-of-accounts
std-chart-of-accounts.description: std-chart-of-accounts — list of all accounts (asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense) that ledger entries post against. Lists accounts in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Activate / Deactivate actions.

std-checkin.name: std-checkin
std-checkin.description: std-checkin — arrival check-in atom listing recorded check-ins (qr or geo). Lists check-ins in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Verify / Revoke actions.

std-checkout-terminal.name: std-checkout-terminal
std-checkout-terminal.description: std-checkout-terminal — retail POS checkout terminal sessions. Lists open sessions in `browsing`; opens a read-only session detail view (terminal, cashier, status, totals, payment method) in `viewing_single`. Tender / Void / Open are the only interactions; post-action transitions re-fetch the list.

std-class-roster.name: std-class-roster
std-class-roster.description: std-class-roster — list of members enrolled in a specific class session. Lists roster entries in `browsing`; opens entry detail in `viewing_single` with Check In / No Show actions.

std-class-session.name: std-class-session
std-class-session.description: std-class-session — scheduled fitness/yoga/dance class session. Lists sessions in `browsing`; opens session detail in `viewing_single` with Start / Cancel actions.

std-court-deadline.name: std-court-deadline
std-court-deadline.description: std-court-deadline — statutory filing deadline tied to a legal matter. Lists deadlines in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Complete / Extend actions.

std-customer-account.name: std-customer-account
std-customer-account.description: std-customer-account — retail customer profile primitive with loyalty points, store credit, and spend history. Lists customers in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Grant Points / Issue Credit / Ban actions.

std-donation-receipt.name: std-donation-receipt
std-donation-receipt.description: std-donation-receipt — tax-deductible donation receipt with IRS-compliance fields (taxYear, taxDeductible, nonprofitEin). Lists receipts in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Email / Void actions.

std-donor.name: std-donor
std-donor.description: std-donor — nonprofit donor primitive (person or org with lifetime giving total). Lists donors in `browsing`; opens donor detail in `viewing_single` with Thank / Solicit actions.

std-drip-sequence.name: std-drip-sequence
std-drip-sequence.description: std-drip-sequence — ordered email drip campaign primitive. Lists sequences in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Activate / Pause / Archive actions.

std-driver.name: std-driver
std-driver.description: std-driver — fleet driver primitive tracking license info, hire date, status, assigned vehicle. Lists drivers in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Suspend / Reinstate / Terminate / Assign Vehicle actions.

std-dunning.name: std-dunning
std-dunning.description: std-dunning — failed-payment escalation ladder for subscriptions. Lists open dunning cases in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Escalate / Resolve / Suspend actions.

std-email-broadcast.name: std-email-broadcast
std-email-broadcast.description: std-email-broadcast — send an email blast to a segment of contacts using a chosen template. Lists broadcasts in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Send / Cancel actions.

std-event.name: std-event
std-event.description: std-event — event-ticketing event entity (date, venue, capacity, recurrenceRule, status). Lists events in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Publish / Cancel / Update actions.

std-form-builder.name: std-form-builder
std-form-builder.description: std-form-builder — survey form composer with list/detail browse + sidebar question and rules editors.

std-health-score.name: std-health-score
std-health-score.description: std-health-score — customer success health score primitive surfacing churn risk via composite usage/support/engagement signals. Lists health scores in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Recalculate / Assign CSM actions.

std-help-article.name: std-help-article
std-help-article.description: std-help-article — Public help center article primitive with title, body, category, view count, and published/draft status.

std-help-category.name: std-help-category
std-help-category.description: std-help-category — Help center category directory grouping articles into sections like Getting Started, Billing, API Reference.

std-interview-slot.name: std-interview-slot
std-interview-slot.description: std-interview-slot — scheduled interview between an applicant and one or more interviewers, with date/time, format, and status.

std-invoice.name: std-invoice
std-invoice.description: std-invoice — invoice generation atom. Owns an Invoice entity (line-items + tax + total + refund tiers via config). Browses invoices in a data-grid with Send / Mark-Paid / Void / Refund actions; viewing state renders the canonical invoice pattern detail.

std-kitchen-display.name: std-kitchen-display
std-kitchen-display.description: std-kitchen-display — restaurant POS kitchen display system. Owns a KitchenTicket entity (one row per kitchen-bound order) and a single management trait that loads pending tickets, renders them in a data-grid with Mark Preparing / Ready / Served actions, and persists status + aging back to the row.

std-lease.name: std-lease
std-lease.description: std-lease — owner-side lease records that tie tenants to property units with dates, monthly rent, and lifecycle status (pending/active/expired/terminated).

std-ledger-entry.name: std-ledger-entry
std-ledger-entry.description: std-ledger-entry — general-ledger journal entry (double-entry debit/credit). Lists entries in `browsing`; opens entry detail in `viewing_single` with Reconcile / Reverse actions.

std-maintenance-request.name: std-maintenance-request
std-maintenance-request.description: std-maintenance-request — tenant-submitted request lifecycle (open → scheduled → in_progress → completed). Request-flow primitive (distinct from work-order's dispatch-flow).

std-matter.name: std-matter
std-matter.description: std-matter — legal matter primitive: a single case (litigation, contract review, immigration filing) with client, status, lead attorney. Lists matters in `browsing`; opens matter detail in `viewing_single` with Close / Hold / Reopen actions.

std-membership.name: std-membership
std-membership.description: std-membership — recurring gym/fitness/club membership with tier, renewal, freeze, and self-managed cancel. Lists memberships in `browsing`; opens membership detail in `viewing_single` with Upgrade / Freeze / Cancel actions.

std-menu.name: std-menu
std-menu.description: std-menu — restaurant POS menu items grouped by category with availability windows. Owns a MenuItem entity (price, category, available, prep time, modifier groups) and a single manage trait that loads items, browses them in a data-grid with Create / Update / Toggle-Available / Delete actions, and persists each verdict back to the row.

std-modifier-group.name: std-modifier-group
std-modifier-group.description: std-modifier-group — restaurant menu item customization groups with required/optional/multi-select constraints. Owns a ModifierGroupRecord entity (constraint type, min/max selections, serialized options) and a single manage trait that loads groups, browses them in a data-grid with Create / Update / Delete actions, and persists each verdict back to the row.

std-nps-survey.name: std-nps-survey
std-nps-survey.description: std-nps-survey — NPS survey primitive tracking per-customer Net Promoter Score responses with category, comment, and follow-up status.

std-offer-letter.name: std-offer-letter
std-offer-letter.description: std-offer-letter — formal job offer primitive. Owns an OfferLetter entity (applicant, position, salary, start date, acceptance status). Browses offers in a data-grid with Send / Revoke actions.

std-payout-ledger.name: std-payout-ledger
std-payout-ledger.description: std-payout-ledger — marketplace vendor payout atom. Lists payouts in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Withdraw / Mark Paid actions.

std-question-bank.name: std-question-bank
std-question-bank.description: std-question-bank — typed question library for surveys. Lists questions in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Update / Delete actions.

std-receipt.name: std-receipt
std-receipt.description: std-receipt — receipt primitive. Lists receipts in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Email / Reprint actions.

std-recurring-charge.name: std-recurring-charge
std-recurring-charge.description: std-recurring-charge — subscription cycle clock. Lists subscriptions in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Charge / Cancel actions.

std-renewal-risk.name: std-renewal-risk
std-renewal-risk.description: std-renewal-risk — Customer Success renewal risk tracker. Lists at-risk accounts in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Mark Saved / Mark Churned actions.

std-rent-charge.name: std-rent-charge
std-rent-charge.description: std-rent-charge — monthly rent charge ledger. Lists charges in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Mark Paid / Late Fee / Waive actions.

std-reorder-rule.name: std-reorder-rule
std-reorder-rule.description: std-reorder-rule — automatic stock-replenishment rule per SKU/location. Lists rules in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Enable / Disable actions.

std-response-collector.name: std-response-collector
std-response-collector.description: std-response-collector — survey per-respondent answer accumulator. Lists responses in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Resubmit / Delete actions.

std-rfi.name: std-rfi
std-rfi.description: std-rfi — Request For Information primitive for construction projects. Lists RFIs in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Submit / Answer / Close actions.

std-route-optimize.name: std-route-optimize
std-route-optimize.description: std-route-optimize — multi-stop route ordering for technician dispatch. Lists routes in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Optimize / Reset actions.

std-segment.name: std-segment
std-segment.description: std-segment — contact segment primitive. Defines a filter criteria for grouping contacts. Lists segments in `browsing`; opens segment detail in `viewing_single` with Recalculate action.

std-stock-level.name: std-stock-level
std-stock-level.description: std-stock-level — on-hand quantity primitive for a SKU at a location. Lists stock rows in `browsing`; opens row detail in `viewing_single` with Adjust / Recount actions.

std-submittal.name: std-submittal
std-submittal.description: std-submittal — construction submittal primitive tracking material/equipment samples reviewed and approved before installation. Lists submittals in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Approve / Reject / Revise / Delete actions.

std-table-map.name: std-table-map
std-table-map.description: std-table-map — restaurant POS interactive floor plan: TableNode entities rendered as draggable nodes (round/rectangle/square) with status (empty/seated/ordered/awaiting-bill/cleaning). Owns a TableNode entity and a single manage trait that loads tables, renders them on a TableFloorPlan canvas, and persists select / move / seat / clear actions back to the row.

std-technician-dispatch.name: std-technician-dispatch
std-technician-dispatch.description: std-technician-dispatch — dispatch board for field technicians. Lists technicians in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Assign / Accept / Reject / Toggle Availability actions.

std-telematics-event.name: std-telematics-event
std-telematics-event.description: std-telematics-event — read-only per-vehicle telemetry stream from GPS/OBD-II devices. Lists events in `browsing`; opens event detail in `viewing_single` with Acknowledge action.

std-template-editor.name: std-template-editor
std-template-editor.description: std-template-editor — message template authoring primitive. Lists templates in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Edit / Save / Delete actions.

std-tenant.name: std-tenant
std-tenant.description: std-tenant — person/company occupying a leased unit. Lists tenants in `browsing`; opens tenant detail (name, contact, lease, move-in/out dates, status) in `viewing_single` with Activate / Move Out actions.

std-ticket-tier.name: std-ticket-tier
std-ticket-tier.description: std-ticket-tier — event ticket pricing tiers (VIP, general, early-bird) with quantity tracking. Lists tiers in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Update / Sell / Close actions.

std-time-entry.name: std-time-entry
std-time-entry.description: std-time-entry — time tracking line within a timesheet: project/task, hours, date, billable flag, rate. Lists entries in `browsing`; opens entry detail in `viewing_single` with Delete action.

std-timesheet.name: std-timesheet
std-timesheet.description: std-timesheet — weekly timesheet primitive holding total/billable hours for one employee. Lists timesheets in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Submit / Approve / Reject / Revise / Delete actions.

std-trial.name: std-trial
std-trial.description: std-trial — subscription trial countdown with auto-convert at expiry. Lists trials in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Convert / Expire / Cancel actions.

std-vehicle.name: std-vehicle
std-vehicle.description: std-vehicle — fleet vehicle primitive. Lists vehicles in `browsing` with fleet stats + map view; opens vehicle detail in `viewing_single` (VIN, plate, make/model, odometer, status, driver) with Assign Driver / Maintenance / Retire actions.

std-vendor-onboarding.name: std-vendor-onboarding
std-vendor-onboarding.description: std-vendor-onboarding — marketplace vendor multi-step KYC + bank-link wizard with identity-doc upload
std-vendor-onboarding.statePattern: bank-link, business-info, error, identity-verify, loading, review, submitted, tax-id

std-waitlist.name: std-waitlist
std-waitlist.description: std-waitlist — sorted queue with auto-promote-on-cancel. Lists waitlist entries in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Promote / Cancel actions.

std-warehouse.name: std-warehouse
std-warehouse.description: std-warehouse — physical or logical storage location. Lists warehouses in `browsing`; opens a warehouse detail view (name, code, address, type, active flag, total SKU count) in `viewing_single`.

std-work-order.name: std-work-order
std-work-order.description: std-work-order — field-service work order lifecycle (created → assigned → en-route → on-site → completed). Lists work orders in `browsing`; opens detail in `viewing_single` with Assign / Travel / Arrive / Complete / Cancel actions.

std-applicant-form.name: std-applicant-form
std-applicant-form.description: std-applicant-form — unified applicant intake: capture applicant + first interview slot atomically.

std-broadcast-builder.name: std-broadcast-builder
std-broadcast-builder.description: std-broadcast-builder composes EmailBroadcast + Segment + TemplateEditor + Modal + Confirmation into a unified broadcast-building UI

std-cart.name: std-cart
std-cart.description: std-cart — shopping cart molecule composing CartItemCartBrowse + Modal-driven add + Confirmation-driven remove + persistor coordinator.

std-ledger-entry-form.name: std-ledger-entry-form
std-ledger-entry-form.description: Tracks balanced journal-entry pairs (debit + credit) before persisting LedgerEntry rows

std-stock-adjustment.name: std-stock-adjustment
std-stock-adjustment.description: Tracks stock-level adjustments as deltas to onHand per sku/warehouse

std-accounting.name: std-accounting
std-accounting.description: Accounting: journal summaries, ledger entries, chart of accounts, AP bills, AR invoices. Pick for full-stack accounting apps.

std-api-gateway.name: std-api-gateway
std-api-gateway.description: API gateway admin: routes, backends, analytics. Pick for API management dashboards.

std-ats-recruiting.name: std-ats-recruiting
std-ats-recruiting.description: ATS recruiting: job openings catalog, applicant intake pipeline, interview scheduling, and offer letters. Pick for hiring/talent apps.

std-booking-system.name: std-booking-system
std-booking-system.description: std-booking-system as a Function — providers, schedule, appointment slots, and bookings (clinic/salon/consult). Stripe-backed deposit payment, email + SMS confirmations.

std-cicd-pipeline.name: std-cicd-pipeline
std-cicd-pipeline.description: CI/CD pipeline: builds with stats and graphs, stages, and deployments backed by GitHub commits.

std-cms.name: std-cms
std-cms.description: CMS: articles, media assets, categories. Pick for editorial/publishing platforms.

std-coding-academy.name: std-coding-academy
std-coding-academy.description: Coding academy: sequence/build/event programming challenges (game-shell) plus a student progress dashboard.

std-construction-pm.name: std-construction-pm
std-construction-pm.description: Construction Project Management: active projects with RFIs, submittals, and change orders. Procore-pattern for GCs and construction PMs.

std-crm.name: std-crm
std-crm.description: CRM: contacts, deals, sales pipelines, and notes. Pick for B2B sales tracking.

std-customer-success.name: std-customer-success
std-customer-success.description: Customer Success: account portfolio, health scores, NPS surveys, and renewal risk for CSMs. Pick for SaaS customer success teams.

std-devops-dashboard.name: std-devops-dashboard
std-devops-dashboard.description: DevOps dashboard: services, alerts, logs, system metrics. Pick for SRE/observability.

std-document-mgmt.name: std-document-mgmt
std-document-mgmt.description: Document management: file-centric workflow with versions, permissions, and e-signature. Pick for compliance + legal apps.

std-ecommerce.name: std-ecommerce
std-ecommerce.description: std-ecommerce as a Function — products with images, cart icon in top bar, Stripe-backed checkout.

std-embedded-dashboard.name: std-embedded-dashboard
std-embedded-dashboard.description: Use for any analytics/BI dashboard (KPIs + charts + filters + export). Prefer over domain organisms (CRUD apps); this composes tiles only.

std-event-ticketing.name: std-event-ticketing
std-event-ticketing.description: Event ticketing: organizers create events with VIP / general / early-bird tiers, attendees buy tickets, gate staff scan QR at door, waitlist auto-promotes when tickets free up. Pick for Eventbrite-style apps.

std-field-service.name: std-field-service
std-field-service.description: Field service: jobs in, assign technicians, optimize routes, check in on-site, and capture a signature on completion. Pick for plumbing/HVAC/dispatch apps.

std-finance-tracker.name: std-finance-tracker
std-finance-tracker.description: Finance tracker: transactions with stats + graphs, summary dashboard, exportable reports.

std-fitness-studio.name: std-fitness-studio
std-fitness-studio.description: Fitness studio: member directory, recurring group-class scheduling, tiered memberships, and class rosters. Pick for gym/yoga/dance studio apps (Mindbody pattern).

std-fleet-mgmt.name: std-fleet-mgmt
std-fleet-mgmt.description: Fleet Management: vehicles, drivers, maintenance, and telematics for operations and supply-chain teams running a vehicle fleet.

std-forum.name: std-forum
std-forum.description: Forum: community Q&A with threaded replies, voting, flagging, tags, and a moderator queue. Pick for Stack Overflow / Reddit / Discourse style sites.

std-healthcare.name: std-healthcare
std-healthcare.description: Healthcare clinic: patients, appointments, intake forms, prescriptions, dashboard. Composed from std atoms (Browse/Modal/Confirmation/Search/Filter/Stats/Graphs/Calendar) with email + SMS + storage services.

std-helpdesk.name: std-helpdesk
std-helpdesk.description: Helpdesk: support tickets, threaded replies, email-out, and team metrics. Pick for customer support apps.

std-hr-portal.name: std-hr-portal
std-hr-portal.description: HR portal: employees, onboarding wizard, time-off calendar, org chart. Composed from std atoms (Browse/Modal/Confirmation/Search/Filter/Stats/Graphs/Calendar) with email + storage.

std-inventory.name: std-inventory
std-inventory.description: Inventory: SKU catalog, multi-location stock levels, warehouse management, reorder rules, and adjustment history. Pick for ops/supply-chain apps.

std-iot-dashboard.name: std-iot-dashboard
std-iot-dashboard.description: IoT dashboard: devices, sensor readings, and alerts. Pick for connected-device monitoring.

std-legal-case.name: std-legal-case
std-legal-case.description: Legal Case Management: matters, billable hours, and court deadlines for law firms and in-house counsel. Pick for litigation, transactional, and regulatory practice.

std-listings.name: std-listings
std-listings.description: Listings: real-estate / jobs / classifieds. Post, browse with map + filters, save searches, and inquire via flat threads.

std-lms.name: std-lms
std-lms.description: LMS: visual course catalog (gallery), enrollment wizard, lesson playback (YouTube), progress dashboard.

std-marketing-campaign.name: std-marketing-campaign
std-marketing-campaign.description: Marketing campaigns: email/SMS broadcasts, audience segments, drip sequences, and message templates. Pick for marketing & advertising apps.

std-marketplace.name: std-marketplace
std-marketplace.description: Marketplace: vendors list products, buyers leave star ratings, admin reviews flagged listings.

std-nonprofit-donations.name: std-nonprofit-donations
std-nonprofit-donations.description: Nonprofit donations: fundraising campaigns, donors, campaign goals, and tax-deductible receipts. Pick for charity/nonprofit fundraising apps.

std-notes.name: std-notes
std-notes.description: Notes: Notion-style personal hierarchical notes with rich-text content, page tree, search, and favorites. Pick for personal/lightweight notes (vs std-wiki for collaborative team KB).

std-project-manager.name: std-project-manager
std-project-manager.description: Project manager: tasks with stats/graphs/calendar, sprints with planning, and burndown metrics. Pick for agile/scrum-style PM tools.

std-property-mgmt.name: std-property-mgmt
std-property-mgmt.description: Property Management: owner-side properties, tenants, leases, rent collection, and maintenance. Pick for landlords / property managers.

std-public-help-center.name: std-public-help-center
std-public-help-center.description: Public Help Center: admin-managed knowledge base with categories, articles, and public search. Pick for Zendesk Guide-style docs portals.

std-realtime-chat.name: std-realtime-chat
std-realtime-chat.description: Realtime chat: channels, messages, presence. Pick for Slack-style team messaging.

std-restaurant-pos.name: std-restaurant-pos
std-restaurant-pos.description: Restaurant POS: floor plan with tables, order at table, kitchen display, tip split at close. Pick for table-service restaurants.

std-retail-pos.name: std-retail-pos
std-retail-pos.description: Retail POS: sales ledger, checkout terminal, receipts, and customer accounts. Pick for general non-restaurant retail.

std-social-feed.name: std-social-feed
std-social-feed.description: Social feed: posts with images, likes, and threaded comments. Pick for Twitter/Instagram-style timelines.

std-subscription-billing.name: std-subscription-billing
std-subscription-billing.description: Subscription billing: plans browser with stats + graphs, embedded recurring-charge + trial managers, modal/confirm CRUD over plans, invoices browser, dunning queue.

std-survey.name: std-survey
std-survey.description: Survey: Typeform-style builder with dynamic questions, skip-logic, response collection, and analytics.

std-time-tracking.name: std-time-tracking
std-time-tracking.description: Time Tracking: employees, timesheets, time entries, billable hours, and approvals. Pick for HR / operations teams tracking workforce hours.

std-trading-dashboard.name: std-trading-dashboard
std-trading-dashboard.description: Trading dashboard: portfolio positions, trade orders, and live market feed.

std-wiki.name: std-wiki
std-wiki.description: Wiki: rich-block authoring, page tree, version history with diff/rollback, full-text search, tags, and backlinks. Pick for internal knowledge bases.

std-app-layout.name: std-app-layout
std-app-layout.description: std-app-layout — dashboard-layout chrome (sidebar nav + top bar with search + topBarActions + notifications) wrapping a single contentTrait slot. Use for list-style apps (CMS / helpdesk / CRM): the chrome stays stable while the consumer's content trait renders the data, and the consumer can add domain icons (cart / profile / help) via topBarActions. Bind once per orbital — the consumer rebinds linkedEntity via `XAppLayout = AppShell.traits.AppLayout -> XEntity` so multiple orbitals in one file each get their own chrome without colliding on a shared atom entity.

std-billable-hour.name: std-billable-hour
std-billable-hour.description: std-billable-hour — generic billable-hour timesheet primitive for legal, agency, and consulting domains. Lists entries in `browsing`; opens entry detail in `viewing_single` with Invoice / Write Off actions.

std-board.name: std-board
std-board.description: std-board — generic N-column board primitive. `config.columns` is an array of column definitions ({ key, label, icon, variant }); the trait `array/map`s them on `BoardItemsLoaded` into `@entity.boards` where each board carries its filtered items + a count. The render is a `data-grid` over `@entity.boards` (one card per column) whose `renderItem` lambda nests a `data-list` over `@col.items` (the cards in that stage). N is config-driven — pass any number of columns; the outer `data-grid`'s `cols` is bound to `@config.gridCols` so the grid wraps if you exceed it. Topology = loading / viewing_board / viewing_card / adding / error — distinct from the cookie-cutter `loading/browsing/viewing_single/error` CRUD shape. App-level atoms (e.g. std-pipeline) compose std-board via `uses` and add a sibling persistor + extended source entity.

std-branching-logic.name: std-branching-logic
std-branching-logic.description: std-branching-logic — survey skip-logic rules. Lists rules in `browsing`; opens rule detail in `viewing_single` with Edit / Delete actions.

std-browse.name: std-browse
std-browse.description: std-browse as a Function — single primitive: data-grid. Owns the fetch + REFETCH (query/filter/page) state machine. Consumers configure fields/imageField/itemActions/cols/gap/variant; the atom renders the grid.

std-cache-aside.name: std-cache-aside
std-cache-aside.description: core atom — std-cache-aside (states: cached, empty, error, loading, stale)

std-calendar.name: std-calendar
std-calendar.description: core atom — std-calendar (states: error, loading, month-view)

std-circuit-breaker.name: std-circuit-breaker
std-circuit-breaker.description: core atom — std-circuit-breaker (states: closed, halfOpen, open)

std-confirmation.name: std-confirmation
std-confirmation.description: Modal-only confirmation trait: renders ONLY to the `modal` slot. Consumers configure icon/title/alertMessage/confirmLabel at the trait-ref call site via `config: { ... }`. Side effects (persist delete, notify, etc.) belong in a sibling coordinator trait that `listens { ConfirmTrait CONFIRM -> DO_DELETE }`.

std-dashboard-grid-layout.name: std-dashboard-grid-layout
std-dashboard-grid-layout.description: std-dashboard-grid-layout — dashboard-layout chrome with 12 numbered tile slots laid out in a responsive simple-grid. Slots default to an internal EmptyTile so callers only bind the tiles they actually need via traitOverrides. Slot count covers the 95th-percentile dashboard (≈3 KPIs + 6 charts + 2 tables + 1 filter row). For agent-authored dashboards, append tile traits via extraTraits[] and bind them to slots via traitOverrides.DashboardGridLayout.config.tileXTrait.

std-date-range.name: std-date-range
std-date-range.description: std-date-range — single primitive: date-range-picker. Owns a DateRange runtime entity; DATE_RANGE_CHANGED persists @payload.from + @payload.to (matching DateRangePicker's emit shape) so cross-trait listeners can route the range into data atoms (Browse REFETCH_FILTER, Stats / Graphs requery).

std-display.name: std-display
std-display.description: std-display — DEPRECATED. Use std-stats (stat-cards) + std-graphs (charts) composed in a molecule (see std-dashboard); the original violated the explicit-binding rule. Preserved so existing imports keep loading.

std-drawer.name: std-drawer
std-drawer.description: std-drawer — drawer-slot atom. Renders ONLY to its `drawer` slot. The runtime's slot wrapper provides the backdrop + right-anchored panel + close-X chrome; the atom emits ONLY the panel body content. Host emits OPEN with payload {id, name, description} → renders body; CLOSE clears the slot. Stateless: state lives in the OPEN payload, not the entity, so the trait stays safe under consumer entity rebinds.

std-esign-request.name: std-esign-request
std-esign-request.description: Generic e-signature request primitive: send a document for signing and track status.

std-event-log.name: std-event-log
std-event-log.description: std-event-log — generic chronological event feed (Stripe activity log / GitHub PR timeline / Linear event feed style). Renders a vertical `timeline` with type-coded dots, a single horizontal chip-bar of kind filters (All + per-kind), reverse-chronological sort, and an inline form for logging events that weren't auto-captured. `config.kindOptions` maps each kind → status/icon/label so consuming molecules/organisms get type-coded visuals without re-implementing topology. Topology = loading / viewing / backfilling / error.

std-export.name: std-export
std-export.description: std-export — a row of export-format buttons. Predefined CSV/XLSX/PDF defaults; caller can override via config.formats. Emits EXPORT_REQUESTED { format, tileId } on the bus; host or sibling orbital generates the file.

std-file-store.name: std-file-store
std-file-store.description: std-file-store — generic file + folder + metadata primitive. Browses files via file-tree + data-grid; opens file detail in `viewing_single` with Download / Archive actions.

std-filter.name: std-filter
std-filter.description: std-filter — single primitive: filter-group. Owns a FilterTarget runtime entity; every FILTER transition persists field/value so cross-trait listeners can route the latest selection into data atoms.

std-flag.name: std-flag
std-flag.description: std-flag — user-initiated content flagging. Owns a Flag entity; SUBMIT persists @payload.data (targetId, targetType, reason, notes) and emits FlagSubmitted so cross-trait listeners (e.g. std-mod-queue) can react.

std-gallery.name: std-gallery
std-gallery.description: std-gallery — image gallery primitive. Browses GalleryItems in a media-gallery grid; opens a lightbox modal for full-size viewing.

std-geosearch.name: std-geosearch
std-geosearch.description: std-geosearch — location-aware search variant: search-input + map-view + range-slider for radius. Owns a GeoSearchResult runtime entity; GEO_SEARCH persists @payload.searchTerm/lat/lng/radiusKm so cross-trait listeners can route them into geo-aware data atoms.

std-graphs.name: std-graphs
std-graphs.description: std-graphs — embeddable chart atom. ITEMS_LOADED groups @payload.data by @config.categoryField (or @config.timeField when timeAxis=true) and aggregates per bucket. Multi-series rendering via @config.series (preformatted ChartSeries shape). Histograms via chartType=histogram pass pre-binned @payload.data through unchanged. Stacked / 100% stacked bars via @config.stack. Post-process sort + limit. Clicking a data point emits UI:@config.drillEvent with { label, value, seriesLabel? }. Drop into a dashboard alongside std-stats / std-browse.

std-image-upload-multi.name: std-image-upload-multi
std-image-upload-multi.description: std-image-upload-multi — multi-image upload with drop zone, gallery preview, and per-batch progress.

std-mod-queue.name: std-mod-queue
std-mod-queue.description: std-mod-queue — moderation queue for content review. Owns a ModQueueItem entity (one row per flagged target) and a single review trait that loads pending items, renders them in a data-grid with Approve / Reject / Escalate actions, and persists the reviewer's verdict back to the row.

std-modal.name: std-modal
std-modal.description: Modal-only trait: renders ONLY to the `modal` slot. The parent molecule's layout/browse trait is responsible for the `main` slot (the list, the trigger buttons, etc.). Consumers configure icon/title/fields/mode at the trait-ref call site via `config: { ... }`. Side effects (persist, notify) belong in a sibling coordinator trait that `listens { ModalTrait SAVE -> DO_PERSIST }`.

std-multi-party-flow.name: std-multi-party-flow
std-multi-party-flow.description: std-multi-party-flow — Escrow.com / DocuSign / Stripe Connect style multi-party transaction. Header + summary (subject/amount/reference) + named parties (avatar/role/actor) + stage progress + your-turn panel + activity feed + dispute/cancel escape hatches. Topology = loading / awaiting / capturing_dispute / capturing_cancel / funded / released / disputed / cancelled / error.
std-multi-party-flow.statePattern: awaiting, cancelled, capturing_cancel, capturing_dispute, disputed, error, funded, loading, released

std-page-tree.name: std-page-tree
std-page-tree.description: std-page-tree — hierarchical wiki navigation with parent/child PageNode rows. Browses pages in a file-tree + data-list; opens a page in `viewing_single` with Delete action; supports drag-reorder.

std-pagination.name: std-pagination
std-pagination.description: std-pagination — single primitive: pagination control. PAGE accepts the Pagination component's `{page}` emit; ITEMS_LOADED accepts an upstream `{data:[object]}` payload and derives totalPages = ceil(len/pageSize). Molecules wire `BrowseItemLoaded -> ITEMS_LOADED` to keep it in lockstep with the data hub.

std-push.name: std-push
std-push.description: External-event subscription atom. Wraps os/watch-http with a small lifecycle state machine (idle -> subscribed ↔ reconnecting) using the emit: config to turn incoming messages + failures into closed-circuit events on the orbital's bus. Intra-frame: embed @trait.PushIndicator in a layout to show a live connection status pill (see molecule std-push-activity-log). Inter-frame: any trait can listens: PUSH_RECEIVED and react to payloads.

std-rating-review.name: std-rating-review
std-rating-review.description: std-rating-review — Airbnb / Amazon / Google Maps style review surface. Header with aggregate score + Write CTA, per-star distribution bars, working sort chips (recent / top rated / lowest), scrollable reviews list with author + stars + comment + helpful action. Topology = loading / viewing / composing / submitting / submitted / error.
std-rating-review.statePattern: composing, error, loading, submitted, submitting, viewing

std-recurrence.name: std-recurrence
std-recurrence.description: std-recurrence — recurring-rule definition + upcoming runs (Stripe Subscriptions / Cron Hub style). The viewing state shows a plain-English rule sentence and the next N dated runs as an agenda timeline. Per-run exception modal supports skip / reschedule. Topology = loading / defining_rule / viewing / awaiting_exception_decision / cancelled / error.
std-recurrence.statePattern: awaiting_exception_decision, cancelled, defining_rule, error, loading, viewing

std-related.name: std-related
std-related.description: Relation-rendering atom. Assumes the linked entity's relation field has already been hydrated by an upstream fetch with include; this atom only owns the rendering of the related children. Paired with std-browse via @trait.X this gives a one-line master-detail layout: hstack [ @trait.ParentList, @trait.ParentRelated ]. The molecule std-related-master-detail is the canonical showcase.

std-rich-editor.name: std-rich-editor
std-rich-editor.description: std-rich-editor — wiki/CMS Notion-style block editor. Browses documents in `browsing`; opens the rich-block-editor on a selected row; persists block edits + publish status.

std-saved-search.name: std-saved-search
std-saved-search.description: std-saved-search — persisted query + alert subscription. Owns a SavedSearch entity (one row per saved query) and a single manage trait that lists saved searches in a data-grid, lets users toggle their alert subscription / rename the search / delete it, and persists each change.

std-scatter.name: std-scatter
std-scatter.description: std-scatter — embeddable scatter / bubble chart atom. ITEMS_LOADED maps @payload.data into {x,y,label,size,color} points using configured fields (no aggregation step — distinct from std-graphs). Drop into a dashboard alongside std-stats / std-graphs for two-numeric correlation views.

std-search.name: std-search
std-search.description: std-search — single primitive: search-input. Owns a SearchResult runtime entity; SEARCH persists @payload.searchTerm (matching SearchInput's emit shape) so cross-trait listeners can route it into data atoms (Browse REFETCH_QUERY).

std-selection.name: std-selection
std-selection.description: core atom — std-selection (states: error, idle, loading, selected, selecting)

std-signature-capture.name: std-signature-capture
std-signature-capture.description: std-signature-capture — proof-of-completion signature capture for field-service jobs and healthcare consent forms. Owns a Signature entity; CHANGE binds @entity.signatureDataUrl; SUBMIT persists @payload.data and emits SignatureSubmitted.

std-stack-layout.name: std-stack-layout
std-stack-layout.description: std-stack-layout — minimal chrome (title + divider) with one contentTrait config slot.

std-stats.name: std-stats
std-stats.description: std-stats — embeddable analytics-card atom. ITEMS_LOADED aggregates @payload.data per @config.metrics (count|sum|avg|min|max|variance with optional filter, baselineFilter, format, icon, max, target, trend, trendPolarity, sparkline) and renders one stat-display per entry. Variance metrics compute actual - baseline using `filter` + `baselineFilter` lambdas and report the signed delta as trend. clickEvent emits UI:{clickEvent} { metricLabel } when a card is clicked. Drop into a dashboard alongside std-browse / std-search / std-filter.

std-step-flow.name: std-step-flow
std-step-flow.description: std-step-flow — generic N-step sequential decision chain (Stripe Connect / TurboTax / Vercel deploy style). `config.steps` is an array of step definitions; the trait projects the current step into a prominent body card and a `wizard-progress` stepper bar at the top. One primary button ADVANCEs along the chain; at the last step the same button finalizes (label/icon/variant swap via entity binding, state routed via guard). REJECT/ESCALATE terminate. Topology = loading / running / approved / rejected / escalated / error.
std-step-flow.statePattern: approved, error, escalated, loading, rejected, running

std-tabs.name: std-tabs
std-tabs.description: std-tabs — embeddable tab-navigation atom. Renders a tabs strip from @config.tabs ([{id, label, icon?, badge?, content?}]); clicking a tab updates @entity.activeTab so only the matching @trait.X content shows. Events remap at the call site for routing, persistence, analytics.

std-tag-taxonomy.name: std-tag-taxonomy
std-tag-taxonomy.description: std-tag-taxonomy — hierarchical category tag tree (parent/child). TagBrowse fetches Tag rows on INIT, renders the active level via data-grid, and on SELECT_TAG drills into a tag's children by binding @entity.id to the chosen parent.

std-thread.name: std-thread
std-thread.description: std-thread — forum-style nested replies with collapse + flat-mode toggle. Owns ThreadPost (persistent). flat:true covers 1:1 linear inquiry threads; flat:false renders forum-style nested. INIT fetches; REPLY persists a child post under @payload.parentId.

std-version-history.name: std-version-history
std-version-history.description: std-version-history — wiki/CMS revision history with diff + rollback. Browses revisions; opens detail in `viewing_single`; compares two revisions in `comparing` with intrinsic version-diff; persists rollback.

std-vote.name: std-vote
std-vote.description: std-vote — forum-style up/down vote tally with single-vote-per-user constraint. Owns a Vote entity; VOTE persists the new direction (toggling to none when re-clicking the active arrow) and emits VoteCasted so cross-trait listeners can recompute aggregates.

std-wizard-form.name: std-wizard-form
std-wizard-form.description: std-wizard-form — canonical molecule-level wizard example (3-step sign-up flow). Wizards own their state machine at molecule tier.

std-wizard.name: std-wizard
std-wizard.description: std-wizard — generic N-step data-collection wizard (Vercel deploy / GitHub repo create / Stripe Connect onboarding style). Each step has its own form fields. Topology = loading / running / completed / cancelled / error. ADVANCE is guard-routed: not-last-step advances; last-step transitions to completed. Distinct from std-step-flow (approval-decision) — wizard collects data via form-section per step, step-flow collects yes/no decisions.

std-dashboard.name: std-dashboard
std-dashboard.description: std-dashboard — molecule composing std-stats + std-graphs + std-browse (stat cards top, charts middle, data list bottom). Browse is the data hub; Stats and Graphs listen for `BrowseItemLoaded -> ITEMS_LOADED`.

std-esign-flow.name: std-esign-flow
std-esign-flow.description: Generic e-signature flow: pick a stored file, pick a recipient, send for signature, track status.

std-filtered-list.name: std-filtered-list
std-filtered-list.description: std-filtered-list — molecule composing slim Search/Filter/Browse/Pagination atoms

std-list.name: std-list
std-list.description: Daisy-chain composition showcase: no `on EVENT { ... }` trait-ref overrides. Modal + Confirmation trait refs are configured via `config: { ... }` at the call site. Side effects (persist) live in a sibling coordinator trait (`ListItemPersistor`) that listens for the modal/confirmation trait emits. Mirrors std-cart's structure. std-list omits the read-only VIEW path that the old version had — form-section's mode set only supports "create" | "edit", and a dedicated detail-view pattern is tracked separately (std-detail).

std-master-detail-layout.name: std-master-detail-layout
std-master-detail-layout.description: std-master-detail-layout — chrome with std-drawer side-panel + masterTrait config slot for the consumer's master list.

std-tabs-layout.name: std-tabs-layout
std-tabs-layout.description: std-tabs-layout — chrome with std-tabs strip; consumer overrides config.tabs[].content with @trait.X references.

std-generic-app.name: std-generic-app
std-generic-app.description: Generic fallback app: 8 reusable orbital factories (Contact, Item, Activity, Task, CalendarEvent, Widget, FeedPost, Note) under shared AppShell chrome. Picked by orbital-agent when no domain-specific organism is a confident match — agent maps prompt nouns to orbitals and supplies entity/title overrides via standard factory params.

fields.name: text
fields.default: Welcome, adventurer. Your journey begins here.

std-overworld.name: std-overworld
std-overworld.description: game atom — std-overworld (states: error, exploring, loading, transitioning)

std-quest.name: std-quest
std-quest.description: game atom — std-quest (states: active, available, complete, error, failed, loading, progressing)
std-quest.statePattern: active, available, complete, error, failed, loading, progressing

std-timer.name: std-timer
std-timer.description: game atom — std-timer (states: expired, idle, paused, running)

std-source-scope-probe.name: std-source-scope-probe
std-source-scope-probe.description: Diagnostic: proves source-scoped listens disambiguate duplicate event names end-to-end.

std-service-calendar-ical.name: std-service-calendar-ical
std-service-calendar-ical.description: std-service-calendar-ical — iCal export service. Bind via `uses CalendarIcal from "std/behaviors/std-service-calendar-ical"` and configure `eventName` / `startsAt` / `endsAt` / `description` / `location` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourEventForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default event form (standalone surface). Generates an .ics file attendees can add to Google/Apple Calendar.

std-service-custom-bearer.name: std-service-custom-bearer
std-service-custom-bearer.description: std-service-custom-bearer — Bearer-token HTTP service. Bind via `uses CustomBearer from "std/behaviors/std-service-custom-bearer"` and configure `endpoint` / `method` / `body` / `token` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourBearerForm"` to inject your own request form; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-email.name: std-service-email
std-service-email.description: std-service-email — Email send service. Bind via `uses Email from "std/behaviors/std-service-email"` and configure `to` / `subject` / `body` / `from` / `replyTo` / `templateId` / `htmlBody` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourEmailForm"` to inject your own composer; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-github.name: std-service-github
std-service-github.description: std-service-github — GitHub service. Bind via `uses Github from "std/behaviors/std-service-github"` and configure `owner` / `repo` / `path` / `ref` / `op` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourGithubForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default form (standalone surface).

std-service-llm.name: std-service-llm
std-service-llm.description: std-service-llm — LLM completion service. Bind via `uses Llm from "std/behaviors/std-service-llm"` and configure `provider` / `model` / `prompt` / `temperature` / `maxTokens` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourLlmForm"` to inject your own prompt form; leave unset to render the atom's default form (standalone surface).

std-service-maps.name: std-service-maps
std-service-maps.description: std-service-maps — Maps service for geocoding, reverse-geocoding, and distance via Mapbox/Google. Bind via `uses Maps from "std/behaviors/std-service-maps"` and configure `apiKey` / `provider` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourMapsForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default geocode form (standalone surface).

std-service-oauth.name: std-service-oauth
std-service-oauth.description: std-service-oauth — OAuth sign-in service. Bind via `uses Oauth from "std/behaviors/std-service-oauth"` and configure `provider` / `scopes` / `redirectUri` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourLoginForm"` to inject your own provider button; leave unset to render the atom's default sign-in form (standalone surface).

std-service-print.name: std-service-print
std-service-print.description: std-service-print — Receipt / kitchen / label printer service (ESC/POS or web-print API). Bind via `uses Print from "std/behaviors/std-service-print"` and configure `defaultPrinter` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourPrintForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default textarea + Print button standalone surface.

std-service-redis.name: std-service-redis
std-service-redis.description: std-service-redis — Redis cache service. Bind via `uses Redis from "std/behaviors/std-service-redis"` and configure `op` / `key` / `value` / `ttl` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourRedisForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default form (standalone surface).

std-service-storage.name: std-service-storage
std-service-storage.description: std-service-storage — Object storage upload service. Bind via `uses Storage from "std/behaviors/std-service-storage"` and configure `bucket` / `acl` / `maxSize` / `allowedMimeTypes` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourUploadForm"` to inject your own picker; leave unset to render the atom's default file picker (standalone surface).

std-service-stripe.name: std-service-stripe
std-service-stripe.description: std-service-stripe — Stripe payment service. Bind via `uses Stripe from "std/behaviors/std-service-stripe"` and configure `amount` / `currency` / `metadata` at the call site. Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourPaymentForm"` to inject your own Stripe Elements card form; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-twilio.name: std-service-twilio
std-service-twilio.description: std-service-twilio — Twilio messaging service. Bind via `uses Twilio from "std/behaviors/std-service-twilio"` and configure `recipient` / `body` / `sender` / `mode` at the call site (mapped to Twilio `to`/`body`/`from`/`mode`). Pass `uiTrait: "@trait.YourMessagingForm"` to inject your own form; leave unset to render the atom's default test form (standalone surface).

std-service-youtube.name: std-service-youtube
std-service-youtube.description: std-service-youtube. YouTube embed service. Bind via `uses Youtube from "std/behaviors/std-service-youtube"` and configure `videoId` / `autoplay` / `controls` / `start` at the call site. SPECIAL: the default render IS the embed itself, so passing `uiTrait: "@trait.YourPlayerSkin"` OVERRIDES the embed (e.g., a custom player skin) rather than supplements it. Leave `uiTrait` unset to render the atom's default embed.

std-service-marketplace.name: std-service-marketplace
std-service-marketplace.description: Marketplace: products, auth, orders, payments. Pick for multi-vendor storefronts.

std-service-research-assistant.name: std-service-research-assistant
std-service-research-assistant.description: Research assistant: knowledge queries, cached results, and generated reports.
std-service-research-assistant.statePattern: complete, error, idle, results, searching, summarizing
